info.title: ReqRes API
info.description: OpenAPI specification for the ReqRes API. Covers legacy demo endpoints, collections, app-user auth flows, custom endpoints, and the Agent Sandbox (/agent/v1/*) for AI coding agents. All /api/* endpoints require x-api-key. All /app/* endpoints require Authorization: Bearer <session_token>. /agent/v1/* endpoints are open in v1 (IP-based rate limiting).

tags.name: Agent Sandbox
tags.description: Endpoints designed for AI coding agents. Cursor pagination, deeply nested resources, deliberate error scenarios, deterministic seeded fixtures.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of demo users. Supports page/per_page query params.

post.description: Creates a demo user. Returns the request payload plus id/createdAt fields.

get.description: Retrieve a single demo user by id.

put.description: Updates a demo user. Returns the request payload plus updatedAt field.

patch.description: Partially updates a demo user. Returns the request payload plus updatedAt field.

delete.description: Deletes a demo user and returns no content.

get.description: Lightweight health check that returns sandbox status, version, uptime, and the caller's current rate-limit status. Cached at the edge for 10 seconds. Cheap to poll. Send the optional x-agent-id header to elevate to Agent Developer tier limits.
Paginated user list with realistic edge cases: nullable nested fields, sparse fieldsets, silent param clamping. Use meta.next_cursor for next page; never increment a page number.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor from previous response. Omit for first page.

get.summary: Get a single agent user with optional expansion
get.description: Returns one user. Without ?expand=, nested resources (addresses, activity, organizations) are returned as references. With ?expand=addresses,activity, those resources are inlined.

post.description: Returns a session for normal accounts or an MFA challenge for accounts with email matching '+mfa@'. Use '+wrong@' or '+locked@' suffixes to trigger 401 branches.

get.description: Orders with relational references (customer, line items, products, addresses). Money is always {amount, currency, formatted}. Some line_items reference deleted products.
Returns the catalogue of available failure scenarios.

Returns a controlled failure for testing agent error handling. All responses include header X-Agent-Sandbox-Intentional: <scenario> so error reporters can suppress them. Available scenarios: rate-limited, server-error, bad-gateway, timeout, validation-error, unauthorized, forbidden, not-found, conflict, too-large, slow, partial-content, redirect-loop, malformed-json, empty-response.

404.description: Not-found scenario or unknown scenario name

504.description: Timeout scenario (returns immediately, see X-Agent-Sandbox-Simulated-Delay header)

amount.description: Value in smallest currency unit (cents for USD, pence for GBP).

formatted.description: Human-readable display string with currency symbol.

next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor or null if at end.
